CREATE TABLE "eeum"."ir_protocol" (
    "protocol_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "unit" integer,
    "header" integer[],
    "zero" integer[],
    "one" integer[],
    "gap" integer,
    "avg_len" integer,
    "model" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_IR_PROTOCOL" PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);


CREATE TABLE "eeum"."ir_remoteir" (
    "model" text,
    "brand" text,
    "device_type" text,
    "created_at" timestamptz,
    "power_consumption" double precision
)
WITH (oids = false);

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."ir_signal" (
    "signal_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "name" text,
    "frame_count" integer,
    "frame_len_us" integer,
    "samples_us" integer[],
    "protocol_id" integer,
    "button_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "model" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_IR_SIGNAL" PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."ir_tx_queue" (
    "tx_id" uuid NOT NULL,
    "scheduled_at" timestamptz,
    "priority" integer,
    "repeat_count" integer,
    "interval_ms" integer,
    "status" text,
    "last_error" text,
    "created_at" timestamptz,
    "signal_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "ir_device_id" character varying NOT NULL,
    "model" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_IR_TX_QUEUE" PRIMARY KEY ("tx_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."room" (
    "room_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "room_name" character varying,
    "room_color" integer,
    "floorplan_id" integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_ROOM" PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

INSERT INTO "room" ("room_id", "room_name", "room_color", "floorplan_id") VALUES
(2,	'침실',	16050132,	1),
(1,	'거실',	14399650,	1),
(6,	'거실',	14268836,	2);

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."routine" (
    "routine_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "name" character varying,
    "trigger_type" boolean,
    "created_at" timestamptz,
    "updated_at" timestamptz,
    "routine_weekday" integer,
    "routine_description" text,
    "user_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "icon_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "is_ai" boolean,
    "act_time" time without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_ROUTINE" PRIMARY KEY ("routine_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

INSERT INTO "routine" ("routine_id", "name", "trigger_type", "created_at", "updated_at", "routine_weekday", "routine_description", "user_id", "icon_id", "is_ai", "act_time") VALUES
(81,	'다들 잘자요~',	'1',	'2025-09-27 18:47:16.833805+00',	'2025-09-27 18:47:16.833806+00',	64,	'굿나잇',	1,	1,	'1',	'03:48:00'),
(82,	'쉬고싶어',	'1',	'2025-09-27 18:47:45.932198+00',	'2025-09-27 18:48:01.451472+00',	7,	'쉬고싶어',	1,	3,	'0',	'12:00:00');

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."routine_detail" (
    "routine_detail" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "device_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "routine_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "device_detail" jsonb,
    "model" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_ROUTINE_DETAIL" PRIMARY KEY ("routine_detail")
)
WITH (oids = false);

INSERT INTO "routine_detail" ("routine_detail", "device_id", "routine_id", "device_detail", "model") VALUES
(134,	47,	81,	'{"additionalProp1": "string", "additionalProp2": "string", "additionalProp3": "string"}',	NULL),
(137,	46,	82,	'{"level": 2, "power": true, "temperature": 0}',	NULL),
(138,	50,	82,	'{"level": 0, "power": true, "temperature": 0}',	NULL);

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."routine_icon" (
    "icon_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "icon_url" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_ROUTINE_ICON" PRIMARY KEY ("icon_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

INSERT INTO "routine_icon" ("icon_id", "icon_url") VALUES
(4,	'icon/fan.svg'),
(5,	'icon/plug.svg'),
(6,	'icon/curtain.svg'),
(7,	'icon/morning-scene.svg'),
(8,	'icon/night-scene.svg'),
(1,	'icons/ic_morning.png'),
(2,	'icons/ic_night.png'),
(3,	'icons/ic_rest.png');

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."services" (
    "service_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "tier_id" integer,
    "fee" integer,
    "interval" integer,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_SERVICES" PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);


CREATE TABLE "eeum"."sido" (
    "sido_code" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "name" character varying,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_SIDO" PRIMARY KEY ("sido_code")
)
WITH (oids = false);

INSERT INTO "sido" ("sido_code", "name") VALUES
(1,	'경상북도');

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."subscribe" (
    "subscribe_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "service_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "subscribe_date" timestamptz,
    "expiration" timestamptz,
    "user_id" integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_SUBSCRIBE" PRIMARY KEY ("subscribe_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);


CREATE TABLE "eeum"."user" (
    "user_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "login_id" character varying,
    "password" character varying,
    "img" character varying,
    "nickname" character varying,
    "email" character varying,
    "join_date" timestamptz,
    "out" timestamptz,
    "last_active" timestamptz,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_USER" PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

INSERT INTO "user" ("user_id", "login_id", "password", "img", "nickname", "email", "join_date", "out", "last_active") VALUES

CREATE TABLE "eeum"."user_home" (
    "user_home_id" integer DEFAULT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
    "user_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "home_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "is_primary" boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_USER_HOME" PRIMARY KEY ("user_home_id")
)
WITH (oids = false);

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ux_user_home_primary_one ON eeum.user_home USING btree (user_id) WHERE (is_primary = true);

INSERT INTO "user_home" ("user_home_id", "user_id", "home_id", "is_primary") VALUES
(3,	3,	3,	'0'),
(5,	2,	5,	'0'),
(4,	1,	4,	'0'),
(1,	1,	1,	'0'),
(15,	1,	2,	'1');

ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."addresses" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_eupmyeondong_TO_addresses_1" FOREIGN KEY (emd_code) REFERENCES eupmyeondong(emd_code) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."addresses" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_gungu_TO_addresses_1" FOREIGN KEY (sgg_code) REFERENCES gungu(sgg_code) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."addresses" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_sido_TO_addresses_1" FOREIGN KEY (sido_code) REFERENCES sido(sido_code) NOT DEFERRABLE;

ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."ai_routine" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_routine_icon_TO_ai_routine_1" FOREIGN KEY (icon_id) REFERENCES routine_icon(icon_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;

ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."command" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_device_TO_command_1" FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."command" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_ir_button_TO_command_1" FOREIGN KEY (button_id) REFERENCES ir_button(button_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."command" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_user_TO_command_1" FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES "user"(user_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;

ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."device" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_ir_device_TO_device_1" FOREIGN KEY (ir_device_id) REFERENCES ir_device(ir_device_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."device" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_user_home_TO_device_1" FOREIGN KEY (user_home_id) REFERENCES user_home(user_home_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;

ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."device_positions" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_device_TO_device_positions_1" FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES device(device_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."device_positions" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_home_TO_device_positions_1" FOREIGN KEY (home_id) REFERENCES home(home_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;
ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."device_positions" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_room_TO_device_positions_1" FOREIGN KEY (room_id) REFERENCES room(room_id) NOT DEFERRABLE;

ALTER TABLE ONLY "eeum"."eupmyeondong" ADD CONSTRAINT "FK_gungu_TO_eupmyeondong_1" FOREIGN KEY (sgg_code) REFERENCES gungu(sgg_code) NOT DEFERRABLE;
